home.title.description: Main heading of the Domain Hunt landing page.

home.submitDomain.description: Button that opens the dialog to submit a new domain to the hunt.

home.trendingTitle.description: Section heading above the list of currently trending domains.

home.signInToSubmitTitle.description: Title of the sign-in gate shown to logged-out users who try to submit a domain.

home.signInToSubmitDescription.description: Body text of the sign-in gate encouraging logged-out users to sign in and submit domains.

timeRange.last7Days.description: Tab/filter label limiting trending domains to the last 7 days.

timeRange.last30Days.description: Tab/filter label limiting trending domains to the last 30 days.

timeRange.anytime.description: Tab/filter label showing trending domains across all time.

tabs.allHunt.description: Header tab label for the main (non-campaign) hunt view showing all domains.

mine.title.description: Heading of the user's personal activity page (submitted and upvoted domains).

mine.upvotedTab.description: Tab label for the list of domains the user has upvoted.

mine.submittedTab.description: Tab label for the list of domains the user has submitted.

mine.signInTitle.description: Title of the auth gate shown when a logged-out user opens their activity page.

mine.signInDescription.description: Body text of the auth gate prompting the user to sign in to see their activity.

list.loadError.description: Error message shown when the trending/campaign domains list fails to load.

list.empty.description: Empty-state message shown at the end of a domains list when there are no more domains.

submitDialog.title.description: Title of the dialog for submitting a new domain to the hunt.

submitDialog.domainNameLabel.description: Field label for the domain name input in the submit dialog.

submitDialog.submitting.description: Submit button text while the domain submission is in progress.

submitDialog.validation.singleLevel.description: Validation error: the entered value must be at least a single-level domain (e.g. example.com).

submitDialog.validation.invalidDomain.description: Validation error: the entered value is not a valid domain name.

submitDialog.validation.mustEndWith.description: Validation error when a domain extension is required. {extension} is the required TLD without the leading dot, e.g. 'cv'.

submitDialog.validation.invalidExtension.description: Validation error: the domain extension (TLD) is invalid.

submitDialog.validation.required.description: Validation error shown when the domain name field is empty on submit.

submitDialog.toast.submitting.description: Loading toast shown while a domain submission request is pending.

submitDialog.toast.alreadyExists.description: Toast shown when the submitted domain already exists in the hunt.

submitDialog.toast.success.description: Success toast shown after a domain is submitted and auto-upvoted.

submitDialog.toast.error.description: Fallback error toast shown when submitting a domain fails.

vote.ariaLabel.description: Accessible label for the upvote button on a domain item.

vote.voting.description: Loading toast shown while an upvote is being recorded.

vote.voted.description: Vote button state indicating the user has already upvoted this domain.

vote.vote.description: Vote button label prompting the user to upvote a domain.

vote.processing.description: Loading toast shown while a vote toggle is being processed on the domain detail page.

vote.removing.description: Button text shown while a vote is being removed.

vote.unvote.description: Button label to remove the user's existing upvote.

vote.removeSuccess.description: Success toast shown after the user's vote is removed.

vote.removeError.description: Error toast shown when removing a vote fails.

vote.confirmRemove.description: Confirmation prompt before removing a vote. {domainName} is the domain being unvoted.

detail.back.description: Back button label on the domain detail page.

detail.quickActions.description: Card title for the quick actions section on the domain detail page.

detail.visitDomain.description: Button that opens the domain's website in a new tab.

detail.deleteSuccess.description: Success toast shown after a domain is deleted from the hunt.

detail.deleteError.description: Fallback error toast shown when deleting a domain fails.

detail.deleting.description: Loading toast shown while a domain is being deleted.

awards.title.description: Card title for the awards section on the domain detail page.

awards.loadError.description: Error message shown when a domain's awards fail to load.

awards.empty.description: Empty-state message shown when a domain has not won any awards yet.

awards.medalLabel.description: Accessible SVG title/label for the medal award icon, announced by screen readers.

submitted.loadError.description: Error message shown when the user's submitted domains fail to load.

submitted.empty.description: Empty-state message shown when the user has not submitted any domains.

submitted.youUpvoted.description: Inline badge on a submitted-domain row indicating the user has also upvoted it. Leading checkmark is part of the string.

submitted.submittedOn.description: Label showing when the user submitted a domain. {date} is the localized submission date.

upvoted.loadError.description: Error message shown when the user's upvoted domains fail to load.

upvoted.empty.description: Empty-state message shown when the user has not upvoted any domains.

upvoted.upvotedOn.description: Label showing when the user upvoted a domain. {date} is the localized upvote date.

campaign.status.ongoing.description: Status badge text for a campaign that is currently active. Exclamation is part of the string.

campaign.status.ended.description: Status badge text for a campaign that has ended.

campaign.status.notStarted.description: Status badge text for a campaign that has not started yet.

campaign.loadErrorTitle.description: Title of the error state shown when campaign domains fail to load.

campaign.loadErrorDescription.description: Body text of the error state shown when campaign domains fail to load.

campaign.emptyTitle.description: Title of the empty state shown when a campaign has no domains.

campaign.emptyDescription.description: Body text of the empty state shown when a campaign has no domains.

campaign.nominatePrompt.description: Prompt text inviting users to nominate a missing favourite domain, shown before the nominate action link.

campaign.nominateAction.description: Inline link/button text that opens the submit dialog to nominate a domain.

campaign.congratulations.description: Celebratory heading shown on the campaign hero once a winner has been awarded.

campaign.winnerCampaignIcon.description: Alt text for the campaign logo/icon image in the campaign hero.

campaign.isTheWinner.description: Trailing text after the winning domain name on the awarded campaign hero, forming e.g. 'example.cv is the winner'.

campaign.votingClosedThanks.description: Message shown on the campaign hero after voting has closed, thanking voters and noting winners are emailed.

howItWorks.voteTitle.description: Title of the 'Vote' step in the campaign how-it-works section.

howItWorks.voteDescription.description: Description of the 'Vote' step: pick your favorite domain.

howItWorks.winTitle.description: Title of the 'Win' step in the campaign how-it-works section.

howItWorks.winDescription.description: Description of the 'Win' step: the winning domain starts issuing subdomains.

howItWorks.celebrateTitle.description: Title of the 'Celebrate' step in the campaign how-it-works section.

howItWorks.celebrateDescription.description: Description of the 'Celebrate' step: claim your free subdomain.

whyVote.title.description: Section heading for the 'Why Vote?' benefits area of a campaign.

whyVote.priorityClaimTitle.description: Benefit title: priority claim on new subdomains.

whyVote.priorityClaimDescription.description: Benefit description: first dibs on new subdomains while supplies last.

whyVote.weeklyNfscTitle.description: Benefit title for the weekly $NFSC reward. Keep '$NFSC' (token symbol) untranslated.

whyVote.weeklyNfscDescription.description: Benefit description: weekly raffle to earn $NFSC for upvoters. Keep '$NFSC' untranslated.

whyVote.launchTitle.description: Benefit title about helping launch a [name].cv domain. Keep the '[name].cv' placeholder literal.

whyVote.launchDescription.description: Benefit description: the [name].cv with the most votes launches subdomain issuance. Keep '[name].cv' literal.

community.joinTitle.description: Heading of the 'Join the Community' block in the campaign community section.

community.joinDescription.description: Body text inviting users to connect with fellow hunters and vote together.

community.shareTitle.description: Heading of the 'Share the hunt' block in the campaign community section.

community.shareDescription.description: Body text inviting users to invite friends and earn raffle entries per vote.

community.inviteFriends.description: Default label of the button that copies the campaign share link.

community.invited.description: Transient label shown on the invite button right after the link is copied.

community.copySuccess.description: Success toast shown after the campaign link is copied to the clipboard.

community.copyError.description: Error toast shown when copying the campaign link fails.

countdown.votingEndsIn.description: Label above the countdown timer indicating time remaining until voting ends.

countdown.days.description: Unit label under the days digits of the countdown timer.

countdown.hours.description: Unit label under the hours digits of the countdown timer.

countdown.minutes.description: Unit label under the minutes digits of the countdown timer.

countdown.seconds.description: Unit label under the seconds digits of the countdown timer.

share.titleDomain.description: Twitter/X share dialog title when sharing a domain. {domainName} is the domain being shared.

share.titleSubject.description: Twitter/X share dialog title when sharing a non-domain subject. {subject} is the item type (e.g. logo, poster); {domainName} is the related domain.

share.descriptionDomainTracked.description: Dialog description when sharing a domain and shares are tracked for rewards.

share.descriptionDomain.description: Dialog description when sharing a domain without reward tracking.

share.descriptionSubject.description: Dialog description when sharing a non-domain subject. {subject} is the item type being shared.

share.shareUrlLabel.description: Field label for the read-only share URL input.

share.quickShareLabel.description: Field label above the quick-share (post to Twitter/X) button.

share.shareOnTwitter.description: Button that opens Twitter/X with a pre-filled post.

share.prefilledHint.description: Hint under the share button. {target} is the domain or item being shared (e.g. 'example.com').

share.alreadyShared.description: Badge shown when the user has already recorded a share for this domain.

share.postUrlLabel.description: Field label for the input where the user pastes their Twitter/X post URL.

share.postUrlHint.description: Hint under the post URL field explaining that pasting the tweet URL earns rewards.

share.recording.description: Submit button text while the share is being recorded.

share.recordShare.description: Submit button label to record the user's share for rewards.

share.invalidPostUrl.description: Validation error shown when the pasted value is not a valid Twitter/X post URL.

share.recordError.description: Fallback error message shown when recording the share fails.

share.checkPostUrl.description: Generic error asking the user to check the post URL and try again.

share.copySuccess.description: Toast shown after the share URL is copied to the clipboard.

share.copyError.description: Toast shown when copying the share URL fails.

share.recordingShare.description: Loading toast shown while the user's share is being recorded.
